creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-05 10:09:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/syslogger   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  syslogger is a software that send file into syslog (local or remote). This
  can be used for example to send a pipe like for example apache log into a
  remote system.
  
  WWW: http://oav.net/projects/syslogger/
  
  PR:             ports/127782
  Submitted by:   Xavier Beaudouin <kiwi at oav.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1039    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/sysutils/syslogger/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/syslogger/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/syslogger/pkg-descr (new)
